description: SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for the EssayEagle production pipeline. 3 phases group 12 workflows. Each workflow produces an output (result.md) that becomes the next workflow's input. At the end of each phase, a phase handover document (_handover/N-<phase>.md) bundles the document set passed to the next phase and the project status advances. Phases can be re-entered ('go back and redo'). AI assistants and the GUI should treat this file as authoritative; the GUI mirror is gui/src/lib/workflow-map.ts. Where the codebase uses a different id, see the 'aliases' field on each workflow.

phase.note: The project's currentPhase points at the phase in progress.

workflow.note: locked = upstream workflow not done yet; ready = inputs available; matches WorkflowState.status in gui/src/lib/types.ts

resume.rule: To resume a project: read project-state.json -> currentPhase + currentWorkflow, then read that workflow's input (the previous workflow's result.md) and the latest _handover/ file. PROJECT.md is the human-readable mirror of this.

goBack.rule: A phase may be re-entered. To redo phase N: set currentPhase to phase N, set its workflows back to 'ready'/'in-progress', set later phases' workflows to 'locked'. Keep prior outputs; supersede them by writing new result.md files. Record the reason in the phase _handover file under 'Revisions'.

qualityLoops.note: Five quality-gated loops. Each does work -> scores a numeric gate -> passes or iterates/backtracks. Full spec: framework/templates/essay-fabrik/LOOPS.md.

perProjectLayout.00 Input: Intake bucket. assignment_brief, grading_rubric, referencing_style_guide, curriculum/, previous_assignments/, additional/. Not a workflow.
perProjectLayout.06 Drafting: Workflow: drafting (revision -> 06 Drafting/revision/, illustration outputs -> 06 Drafting/illustrations/)
perProjectLayout.runs/: Immutable vNNN snapshots of each FQA-loop iteration (draft + fqa-report + fqa-score.json + version-lock.md). CHANGELOG.md is the rolling history.

workflowOutputConvention: Each workflow writes its deliverable to '<folder>/result.md'. That file is the handover into the next workflow (its input).

phases.name: Preparation
phases.goal: Understand the assignment, map the module, and decide what the essay will be about.

workflows.input: Assignment Brief, Grading Rubric, referencing style, constraints (from 00 Input).
workflows.output: Assessment Summary: parsed requirements, rubric criteria, formal constraints, key expectations.
Theory map: curriculum concepts with placement suggestions and module alignment.
workflows.note: Runs BEFORE brainstorming: map the module's concepts first, then brainstorm a topic within that map.

workflows.output: Five brainstorming options, selected topic, preliminary thesis statement (per brainstorming-output-template.md).

phases.name: Creation
phases.goal: Gather evidence, structure the argument, write and iterate the draft.

workflows.output: Source database: citations, key findings, paraphrases, source-quality assessment (references_wiki/); includes the Elicit deep-research round-trip.

workflows.input: Assessment Summary, topic, theory map, source database.
workflows.output: Detailed skeleton: per-chapter question, rough claim, evidence/theory slots, word budget.

workflows.input: Approved skeleton, paraphrases, theory map, style profile.
workflows.output: Complete draft: each chapter answers its question via Claim->Evidence->Counter->Conclusion.

workflows.input: Current draft; FQA recommendations when re-entered from the quality loop.
workflows.output: Revised draft (argumentation, flow, authenticity); each iteration snapshotted to runs/vNNN.

phases.name: Finalisation
phases.goal: Score against the rubric, apply fixes, package for submission, and close out.

workflows.output: FQA report: weighted fqaScore (K&U 30% / A&E 50% / C&R 20%) + prioritised improvement actions.
Final document with all FQA fixes applied.
Cover sheet, statement of authenticity, correct filename, final compliance check.

workflows.input: Cost ledger + process notes from all sessions.
workflows.output: Cost analysis per role and phase, lessons learned, process improvements.
